identity.name: English Teachers Planner
identity.aesthetic: Modern EdTech - Clean, Teal-focused, Paper-like surfaces

containers.document: max-w-4xl mx-auto bg-white shadow-lg min-h-[800px] p-12 border border-slate-200

buttons.primary: bg-teal-700 hover:bg-teal-800 text-white shadow-sm rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-teal-700 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-teal-700 hover:bg-teal-50 rounded-md px-4 py-2

cards.base: bg-white rounded-lg border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-teal-600 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.grade: bg-teal-100 text-teal-800 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold
badges.scenario: bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold
badges.theme: bg-slate-100 text-slate-800 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold

hero_bg.description: Bright, empty classroom background for login or hero sections

planning_desk.description: Organized desk with supplies, representing the planning process

classroom_interaction.description: Teacher reading to students, representing the 'Scenario' context

instructions_to_main_agent.general: You are building a tool for teachers. It must be calm, clear, and error-proof. Avoid flashy animations. Focus on 'Click -> Result'.
instructions_to_main_agent.theme_setup: Update tailwind.config.js to use the Teal-700 as primary color. Ensure the font 'Manrope' is imported in index.css.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout_strategy: Use a 'Sidebar + Content' layout or a 'Centered Dashboard' layout. The 'Preview' page must look like a real piece of paper (white box on gray bg).
instructions_to_main_agent.components: Use Shadcn UI for all interactive elements. Customize the 'Select' and 'Card' components to match the Teal theme.
instructions_to_main_agent.accessibility: Ensure all text has high contrast (Teal-800 on White). Use aria-labels for all icon buttons.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: Add data-testid to all selectors (e.g., 'grade-selector', 'scenario-selector') and the 'generate-btn'.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) sparingly, mostly for sticky headers.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
